revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-4-175

A power system that ensures that there is no harmful fluctuation in the electric supply to equipment, in the event of any failure in the regular supply.


Note: Maintenance of the supply following an important failure may require subsequent change-over to an emergency supply; the no-break power system eliminates harmful fluctuations during change-over.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|No-break power system}}
